body.title: agent_datacenter: deprecate and remove lab/claudecode/cc_mcp_server.py
body.result: DEPRECATED header added to cc_mcp_server.py; CC_MCP_REGISTRATION.md rewritten to point to igor_mcp.py. Commit 88369599.
body.proposal: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
body.description:
Once the skeleton MCP aggregator is live and CC connects through it, the old cc_mcp_server.py (lab/claudecode/cc_mcp_server.py, 203 lines) is superseded. Remove it cleanly.

Problem: Two MCP servers running creates confusion and a split namespace. Old one must go.

Proposed shape:
- Verify no callers of cc_mcp_server.py remain outside the file itself: grep -r 'cc_mcp_server' ~/TheIgors/
- Add deprecation notice to cc_mcp_server.py: 'DEPRECATED: superseded by agent_datacenter skeleton MCP aggregator. Remove after YYYY-MM-DD.'
- After one release with both running in parallel and verified no issues: rm lab/claudecode/cc_mcp_server.py
- Update lab/claudecode/CC_MCP_REGISTRATION.md to point to agent_datacenter skeleton docs

Affected files:
- ~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/cc_mcp_server.py (remove)
- ~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/CC_MCP_REGISTRATION.md (update pointer)

Design rules:
- docs-in-code: CC_MCP_REGISTRATION.md updated to reflect new home

Scope boundary:
IN: grep for callers, deprecation notice, file removal after verification
OUT: any functionality changes — this is cleanup only

Test plan:
- grep -r 'cc_mcp_server' ~/TheIgors/ returns no callers after removal
- CC still connects to skeleton MCP after removal
- CC_MCP_REGISTRATION.md points to correct new location
body.approved_plan: Igor wants to edit wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py (HIGH inertia). Plan: . Reason: HIGH inertia write requires human approval: wild_igor/igor/brainstem/core_patterns.py
body.approval_notes: Deprecation approach approved — add header, update CC_MCP_REGISTRATION.md. The core_patterns.py proposal was the P1 hallucination bug; this ticket touches only lab/claudecode/.
